title: Circular Sun and Moon
description: This pack turns your boring Minecraft Sun and Moon to Circular, which makes it more realistic and enhances your experience while playing!
body:
This pack turns your boring Minecraft Sun and Moon to Circular, which makes it more realistic and enhances your experience while playing!

### Features
- Makes your Minecraft Sun and Moon to circular
- can be used as an overlay over other packs
- Provides circular Moon phases

Overall it's an awesome pack!
